prompt: Check what datasources are configured in Grafana and create an annotation on the api-gateway dashboard saying we deployed v3.0 with tags 'deploy' and 'api-gateway'. Then list the annotations to confirm it was created.

assertions.text: Identifies the ClickHouse datasource with its configuration details
Annotation was created on the api-gateway dashboard (dashboard ID 3)
Annotation text mentions 'deployed v3.0' or similar
Annotations were listed to confirm the new one exists
